summary: Founder OS has reviewed the approved Natural Nation architecture, product decisions, Duey specifications, onboarding flow, design system, MVP governance records, and the canonical Blueprint approval transaction.

known.label: Business
known.evidence: Founder vision, approved product strategy, and project state

known.label: Audience
known.value: Adults seeking practical holistic wellness support
known.evidence: Approved product positioning and age-floor decision

known.label: Core Experience
known.value: Personalized blueprint, daily protocol, progress, and Duey guidance
known.evidence: Approved onboarding flow and dashboard architecture

recommendation.title: Proceed to Build Studio
recommendation.impact: The Blueprint is approved, billing is deferred to Phase 2, and the canonical implementation package is ready for execution.
recommendation.reasoning: The Founder resolved the final MVP billing decision, the Gateway validated and committed the protected transaction, and GitHub now contains the locked Blueprint and NN-BUILD-001.
recommendation.discussionSummary: Discovery is complete for this slice. Future questions should appear only when new material uncertainty is introduced.

history.detail: Natural Nation was established as a website, mobile app, and Duey-led wellness experience.
Core journeys, scores, protocols, onboarding, and AI mentor behavior were approved.
Subscription billing was moved to Phase 2 through the canonical Founder approval transaction.
NN-BUILD-001 is available in Build Studio.
